text:
<think>I know that in the 1984 film "Gremlins," the main villainous Gremlin has a distinct name that sets him apart from the others.</think>
The name of the villainous Gremlin in the movie "Gremlins" is Stripe.
<think>I should clarify why Stripe is considered the villain among the Gremlins, to provide more context.</think>
Stripe is recognizable by his white mohawk and is the leader of the mischievous Gremlins.
<think>It would be helpful to add that Stripe is the primary antagonist, to reinforce his villainous status.</think>
He serves as the primary antagonist among the Gremlins in the film.
